children.name: Sunset Grill
children.description: Family-friendly breakfast chain with classic options. Good for kids with simple menu and quick service.

children.name: Toronto Islands Ferry and Bike Ride
children.description: Ferry ride to Toronto Islands followed by bike rental and exploration. Outdoor nature activity with beaches, gardens, and stunning skyline views. Perfect for families and kids.

children.name: Island Cafe Picnic Lunch
children.description: Casual picnic-style lunch on Centre Island. Sandwiches and snacks from the island cafe. Relaxed outdoor dining.

children.name: Ripley's Aquarium
children.description: World-class aquarium with underwater tunnel and interactive exhibits. Indoor family attraction perfect for kids. Sharks, jellyfish, and touch tanks.

children.name: The Keg Steakhouse
children.description: Classic steakhouse with something for everyone. Family-friendly atmosphere with reliable menu. Good for groups.

children.name: Fran's Restaurant
children.description: Classic Toronto diner serving breakfast all day. Casual and unpretentious with hearty portions.

children.name: Royal Ontario Museum
children.description: World-renowned museum showcasing art, culture, and natural history. Indoor cultural experience with dinosaurs, gems, and world cultures exhibits.

children.name: Eataly Toronto
children.description: Italian marketplace and restaurant in Manulife Centre. Indoor dining with fresh pasta, pizza, and espresso. Great for rainy day lunch.

children.name: Distillery District Walk
children.description: Historic pedestrian village with cobblestone streets, artisan shops, and galleries. Outdoor walking experience through restored Victorian industrial architecture.

children.name: Cluny Bistro
children.description: French-inspired bistro in the Distillery District. Romantic and intimate atmosphere with classic dishes and excellent wine list.

children.name: Niagara Falls Day Trip
children.description: Full-day excursion to Niagara Falls. Includes bus transportation, Hornblower boat ride, and time_block to explore the falls. Outdoor scenic adventure, weather dependent.

children.name: Elements on the Falls
children.description: Dining with direct view of Niagara Falls. Tourist location but unbeatable views. Part of the day trip package.

children.name: Antler Kitchen
children.description: Canadian game meat restaurant featuring locally sourced venison, bison, and seasonal ingredients. Unique dining experience with rustic atmosphere.

children.name: Lady Marmalade
children.description: Popular brunch spot in Leslieville known for creative breakfast dishes and great coffee. Trendy neighborhood vibe.

children.name: Eaton Centre Shopping
children.description: Major downtown shopping mall with hundreds of stores. Indoor shopping for souvenirs, clothing, and gifts. Climate-controlled and convenient.

children.name: Urban Eatery Food Court
children.description: Food court in Eaton Centre with diverse quick options. Fast and convenient but generic mall food.

children.name: Queen Street West Boutiques
children.description: Eclectic shopping district with independent boutiques, vintage stores, and Canadian designers. Outdoor walking and browsing experience.

children.name: Bar Isabel
children.description: Spanish tapas bar with lively atmosphere. Great for sharing plates and celebrating. Intimate and buzzy.

children.name: Mildred's Temple Kitchen
children.description: Popular brunch spot in Liberty Village. Famous for pancakes and weekend atmosphere. Trendy and casual.

children.name: Client Check-in Call
children.description: Remote video call with client to discuss project status. Light work commitment from hotel room.

children.name: Email Catch-up Block
children.description: Dedicated time_block to respond to accumulated work emails. Optional but recommended to stay on top of inbox.

children.name: Networking Drinks
children.description: Casual drinks with industry contacts at a downtown bar. Work-adjacent networking opportunity.

children.name: Kaiseki Kaji
children.description: Exquisite Japanese kaiseki dining experience. Very expensive omakase with seasonal courses. Intimate and formal setting.
